Class Card

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Abstract.Card
Direct Known Subclasses:
Building, Tribe
public abstract class Card extends Object
Base class for every card in the game, storing era and board position. This common foundation is used for both Tribe cards (Characters/Events) and Buildings.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Card()
    Default constructor required by JSON deserialization.
    Card(Era era, Position position)
    Creates a card with the given era and position.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getAssetId()
    Returns the GUI asset identifier, or -1 if not assigned.
    Era
    getEra()
    Returns the era associated with this card.
    Position
    getPosition()
    Returns the current board position of the card.
    void
    setAssetId(int assetId)
    Assigns the GUI asset identifier.
    void
    setPosition(Position position)
    Updates the board position of the card.

  • Constructor Details

    • Card

      public Card()
      Default constructor required by JSON deserialization.

    • Card

      public Card(Era era, Position position)
      Creates a card with the given era and position.
      Parameters:
      era - The era associated with the card.
      position - The initial board position.

  • Method Details

    • getPosition

      public Position getPosition()
      Returns the current board position of the card.
      Returns:
      The current position.

    • getEra

      public Era getEra()
      Returns the era associated with this card.
      Returns:
      The era (I, II, or III).

    • getAssetId

      public int getAssetId()
      Returns the GUI asset identifier, or -1 if not assigned.

    • setAssetId

      public void setAssetId(int assetId)
      Assigns the GUI asset identifier.

    • setPosition

      public void setPosition(Position position)
      Updates the board position of the card.
      Parameters:
      position - The new board position to assign.
